name: Uranium Energy Corp.
description: Uranium Energy Corp. is a leading U.S.-based uranium mining and exploration company. The company is advancing the next generation of low-cost, environmentally friendly In-Situ Recovery (ISR) mining projects in the United States and Canada. With a robust pipeline of projects, including the fully licensed Hobson Processing Facility in Texas and the Irigaray ISR plant in Wyoming, UEC is well-positioned to supply the growing global demand for clean, reliable, and emission-free nuclear energy.
